shortcuts.name: Dev Daily Bootstrap
steps: Open Developer dashboard note or README
shortcuts.failure_policy: Stop on first failed app open; record the failure in Developer/logs.

shortcuts.name: Remote CI Controller
steps: Run SSH command on build host to fetch the branch
Run the repository test command on the build host
Save stdout and stderr to Developer/logs
shortcuts.failure_policy: Do not deploy. Keep the branch remote-only until logs are reviewed.

shortcuts.name: Dev Backup Snapshot
shortcuts.trigger: Daily automation or manual before risky work
steps: Open Working Copy and verify all important repositories are pushed
Create a dated export folder under Developer/backups
Copy run logs and release notes into the export folder
Upload encrypted backup through the selected storage provider
shortcuts.failure_policy: Block destructive changes until backup succeeds or an explicit risk waiver is written.

shortcuts.name: Incident Freeze
shortcuts.trigger: Manual when credentials, production, or data integrity are at risk
steps: Rotate exposed token in password manager or provider console
Push a revocation or remediation branch if code is affected
shortcuts.failure_policy: Escalate to desktop or server access. Do not keep editing on the phone if evidence collection is incomplete.
